shots.positive_prompt: Close-up of a sleek, futuristic robotic arm with chrome and matte black finishes, delicately picking up a thin, transparent sheet of glass in a dimly lit, high-tech workshop with soft ambient lighting and shallow depth of field
shots.subtitle: The robot carefully selects the raw material.

shots.positive_prompt: Medium shot of the robotic arm holding the glass sheet while a precise, glowing red laser beam sweeps across it, shaping and molten edges, sparks flying, with dramatic backlighting and lens flare in the futuristic workshop
shots.subtitle: Laser precision transforms the glass form.

shots.positive_prompt: Close-up of the robotic arm's polished tip gently buffing the now-formed glass sculpture, which shows intricate curves and reflections, with soft golden lighting highlighting the smooth surfaces and the robot's meticulous movements
shots.subtitle: Final touches reveal flawless craftsmanship.

shots.positive_prompt: Wide shot of the completed glass sculpture standing on a pedestal, emitting a beautiful, ethereal blue and white glow that illuminates the dark workshop, with the robotic arm retracting slowly in the background, cinematic lighting and slow camera pan
shots.subtitle: The finished artwork radiates with light.
